title: HoloDeck Agent Configuration
description: Schema for HoloDeck AI agent YAML configuration files

not.description: test_cases and test_cases_file are mutually exclusive

embedding_provider.description: Provider for embedding generation. Required when provider: anthropic + vectorstore/hierarchical tools. Supports openai and azure_openai only.

claude.description: Claude Agent SDK-specific settings. Applicable only when model.provider: anthropic.

response_format.description: Response format schema (inline dict, file path, or null)

tool_filtering.description: Automatic tool filtering configuration. When enabled, dynamically filters tools per request based on semantic similarity to reduce token usage.

evaluations.description: Evaluation configuration with 'model' (optional default LLM) and 'metrics' array

test_cases_file.description: Path to an external YAML file containing test cases (resolved relative to the agent.yaml directory). The file may be a top-level list of test-case dicts or a dict with a 'test_cases:' key. Mutually exclusive with the inline 'test_cases' field.

deployment.description: Cloud deployment configuration for containerizing and deploying the agent

description.description: Human-readable description used by the parent agent for routing decisions. Required by the SDK.

prompt.description: Inline system prompt for the subagent. Mutually exclusive with prompt_file. Either prompt or prompt_file is required.

prompt_file.description: Path to a file containing the subagent's system prompt. Resolved relative to the agent.yaml directory. Mutually exclusive with prompt. File contents are inlined at config-load time.

tools.description: Allowlist of tool names. When null/omitted, the subagent inherits all parent tools. Unknown entries produce a warning at load time, not an error.

model.description: Model override for this subagent. Passed through to the SDK verbatim (e.g. 'sonnet', 'haiku', 'inherit', or a full model id). The SDK is the source of truth for valid values.

SubagentSpec.description: A single subagent definition for multi-agent orchestration.

working_directory.description: Scope agent file access to this path. Becomes subprocess cwd.

permission_mode.description: Level of autonomous action: manual (safest), acceptEdits, or acceptAll

max_turns.description: Maximum agent loop iterations (null = SDK default)

max_concurrent_sessions.description: Maximum concurrent Claude SDK subprocesses per serve instance. When unset, the serve layer derives the cap from the replica's cgroup memory limit divided by session_memory_estimate_mib (spec 034 P1a).

session_memory_estimate_mib.description: Estimated resident memory (MiB) per active Claude SDK subprocess, used to derive max_concurrent_sessions from the replica's cgroup memory limit. Default 200 MiB (spec 034 P1a).

agents.description: Named subagent definitions. Each entry becomes an AgentDefinition on ClaudeAgentOptions.agents. Subagents share parent MCP server registrations and use their `tools` allowlist to scope MCP tool access (`mcp__<server>__<tool>`). Per-subagent MCP server registration is NOT supported by the SDK.

allowed_tools.description: Explicit tool allowlist (null = all configured tools)

effort.description: Thinking effort level (low | medium | high | max)

max_budget_usd.description: Hard cap on session spend in USD. Must be > 0.

fallback_model.description: Model used when the primary model is unavailable

disallowed_tools.description: Tools that must never be used; takes precedence over allowed_tools

i_understand_this_is_unsafe.description: Acknowledge that permission_mode=acceptAll disables the Claude SDK permission system entirely, allowing any tool (including Bash, Write, Edit, WebFetch) to execute without restriction. Required to use permission_mode=acceptAll. Prefer declaring specific tools via bash, file_system, web_search, or allowed_tools instead.

ClaudeConfig.description: Claude Agent SDK-specific settings. All capabilities default to disabled (least-privilege).

auth_provider.description: Authentication method for Anthropic provider. Defaults to api_key. Ignored for non-Anthropic providers.

Instructions.description: System instructions (file OR inline, mutually exclusive)

endpoint.description: OpenSearch endpoint URL (required when provider is 'opensearch')

index_name.description: OpenSearch index name (required when provider is 'opensearch')

api_key.description: API key auth (alternative to basic auth)

KeywordIndexConfig.description: Keyword index configuration for sparse/BM25 search backend

SearchMode.description: Search modality: semantic (embeddings), keyword (BM25), or hybrid (combined)

ChunkingStrategy.description: Document chunking approach: structure (markdown headings) or token (fixed splitting)

DocumentDomain.description: Document structure domain for subsection detection

database.description: Vector DB config or reference name

is_retrieval.description: Mark as retrieval tool for RAG

source.description: Path to markdown document or directory

document_domain.description: Document structure domain for subsection detection

semantic_weight.description: Weight for semantic search in hybrid mode

keyword_weight.description: Weight for keyword search in hybrid mode

exact_weight.description: Weight for exact search in hybrid mode

contextual_embeddings.description: Enable contextual embeddings with LLM context

context_model.description: LLM for contextual embedding generation. Overrides the default model used by LLMContextGenerator.

database.description: Vector DB config or reference name

keyword_index.description: Keyword index configuration for sparse/BM25 search backend

Tool.description: Agent tool (discriminated by 'type' field: vectorstore, function, mcp, prompt, or hierarchical_document)

metric.description: Built-in metric name. 'equality' and 'numeric' are deterministic in-process evaluators (US4); the rest are LLM-judged.

strip_whitespace.description: [equality] Collapse whitespace and trim before compare.

relative_tolerance.description: [numeric] Pass when abs(actual - expected) <= relative_tolerance * abs(expected).

response_path.description: Optional path into a JSON-encoded response (e.g. 'answer', 'items[0].score'). When set, the evaluator grades response[<path>] instead of the raw string.

evaluation_params.description: Test case fields to include in evaluation

grader.description: Import path 'module.path:callable_name'. Resolved at config load time.

threshold.description: Applied if grader returns a float without explicit passed flag.

fail_on_error.description: If true, grader exceptions fail the whole test case.

name.description: Optional display name; defaults to the callable name.

MetricType.description: Evaluation metric (discriminated by 'type' field: standard, geval, rag, or code)

model.description: Default LLM model for all metrics

metrics.description: List of evaluation metrics (standard, geval, or rag). Each metric must have a 'type' field.

EvaluationConfig.description: Evaluation framework configuration with model and metrics

FileInput.description: Multimodal file input (path OR url required)

always_include.description: Tool names always included in context regardless of score.

always_include_top_n_used.description: Number of most-used tools to always include (0-20).

ToolFilterConfig.description: Configuration for automatic tool filtering. Reduces token usage by selecting only the most relevant tools per request.

ArgMatcher.description: Per-argument matcher used inside ExpectedTool.args. A scalar/list/dict-without-matcher-keys is treated as a literal value (exact equality, with int/float numeric equivalence). A single-key object {fuzzy: <pattern>} or {regex: <pattern>} selects a tolerant or anchored-regex match. Discrimination is shape-based — `anyOf` is intentional.

args.description: Per-arg matcher map (FR-004). Each value is an ArgMatcher (literal, fuzzy, or regex).

ExpectedTool.description: Object form of an expected tool assertion (FR-003).

ExpectedToolEntry.description: Either a bare tool name string (legacy) or an ExpectedTool object (US3).

ground_truth.description: Expected output for this turn (non-empty if provided).

expected_tools.description: Tools expected to be called during this turn. Mixed list of bare strings and ExpectedTool objects.

files.description: Multimodal file inputs for this turn.

retrieval_context.description: Retrieved text chunks for RAG evaluation on this turn.

turn_config.description: Free-form per-turn config surfaced to code graders as `ctx.turn_config` (e.g. `turn_program`).

Turn.description: Single exchange within a multi-turn test case (feature 032).

expected_tools.description: Tools expected to be called. Mixed list of bare strings (legacy) and ExpectedTool objects (US3). Single-turn only.

ground_truth.description: Expected output for comparison. Single-turn only.

retrieval_context.description: Retrieved text chunks for RAG evaluation. Single-turn only.

evaluations.description: Per-test metric overrides (standard, geval, rag, or code).

turns.description: Ordered multi-turn conversation (feature 032). Mutually exclusive with single-turn fields (`input`, `ground_truth`, top-level `expected_tools`, `files`, `retrieval_context`).

TestCase.description: Test case — either single-turn (with `input`) or multi-turn (with `turns`).

parallel_test_cases.description: Maximum concurrent multi-turn test cases (FR-009a). Resolved via CLI > YAML > env > defaults (default 1).

capture_content.description: Capture prompts and completions in spans (sensitive data)

redaction_patterns.description: Regex patterns for redacting sensitive data

include_trace_context.description: Include trace/span IDs in log records

console.description: Console exporter (default if no other exporters)

TagStrategy.description: Strategy for generating container image tags

ProtocolType.description: API protocol type for agent serving

url.description: Registry URL (e.g., ghcr.io, docker.io, ECR URL)

ecr_role_arn.description: IAM role ARN for ECR access

aws.description: AWS App Runner configuration (required when provider is 'aws')

gcp.description: GCP Cloud Run configuration (required when provider is 'gcp')

azure.description: Azure Container Apps configuration (required when provider is 'azure')

platform.description: Target platform for container image (e.g., linux/amd64, linux/arm64)

DeploymentConfig.description: Main deployment configuration for containerizing and deploying agents
